About.Name: Carl Luidee P Lim
About.AboutText:
I am a senior student at Seattle Pacific University, pursuing a degree in Computer Science.

Growing up in a poor neighborhood in the Philippines, I faced hardships that sparked a passion for technology and programming. I am excited to deepen my knowledge and skills in these dynamic fields. I found joy and inspiration in building DIY projects and bringing ideas to life. I’m driven to use that passion to inspire and create opportunities for underserved communities.

In addition to my coursework, I am currently a member of SPU's Ctrl+Bot Club, where I collaborate with other prospective engineers who share my enthusiasm for innovation and problem-solving.

For my academic pursuits, I have diverse interests in music, game design, and artificial intelligence. I am particularly interested in the tech industry and actively seeking internships to gain valuable experience.

Experience.ExperienceText: Detail-oriented and driven individual with a strong background in C++ and Python programming. Searching for an internship to further my skills and experience. My dedication lies in leveraging my technical expertise to innovate software development and engineering solutions. As a creative problem solver, I can swiftly adjust to evolving situations and maximize every opportunity that comes my way.
Experience.EducationText: Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Science degree for Computer Science | 3.51 GPA | Active member of the Ctrl+Bot Club
Experience.SkillsText:
• Thrives in team-based and mission-driven organizations
• Proficient in troubleshooting and debugging
• Committed to writing clean and maintainable code
• Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
• Adaptable to changing development environments
• Motivated and self-driven

Project1.Title: Recipe Manager and Archive App
Project1.Desc: Application that allows users to manage recipes in an efficent and streamlined manner.

Project2.Title: A Game
Project2.Desc: A simple turn-based game made using HTML.
